zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Amfridus de Denne II於1122年出生在英國肯特金斯頓時，他的父親Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst35歲，母親Johanna Sybella de Gatton33歲。他於1150年與Beatrice Bassett在英國諾薩普頓史爾盧申頓結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1189年在英國英格蘭多瑟特普爾貝可享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭多瑟特普爾貝可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Amfridus de Denne II于1122年出生在英国肯特金斯頓时，他的父亲Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst35岁，母亲Johanna Sybella de Gatton33岁。他于1150年与Beatrice Bassett在英国諾薩普頓史爾盧申頓结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1189年在英国英格兰多瑟特普爾貝可享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰多瑟特普爾貝可。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Denne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (mainly northern) and Walloon: probably a variant of Dhenne, a patronymic, with fused preposition d(e) ‘of’, from Henne, a pet form of the personal names French Henri, Flemish Hendrik (see Henry 1). Alternatively, perhaps a variant of Daine, the feminine form of Dain .

variants.name: Denn
meanings: English (Kent): variant of Denne , a habitational name from one or more of the numerous places in Kent and Sussex with names derived from Middle English den ‘woodland swine-pasture’ (Old English denn), such as Denne Manor in Chilham, Denne Hill in Kingston, and Denne Court in Woodnesborough (Kent); Denne Park in Horsham, Denne in Warnham, and Dann's Farm in Willingdon (Sussex).
English: possibly from a pet form of   Denis  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Amfridus de Denne II was born in 1122, in Kingston, Kent, England, his father, Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst, was 35 and his mother, Johanna Sybella de Gatton, was 33. He married Beatrice Bassett in 1150, in Rushton, Northamptonshire, England. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1189, in Purbeck, Dorset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Purbeck, Dorset, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Amfridus de Denne II est né en 1122, à Kingston, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Johanna Sybella de Gatton, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice Bassett en 1150, à Rushton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1189, à Purbeck, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Purbeck, Dorset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Buckhurst, Sussex, England: Buckhurst by Withyham, Sussex, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Amfridus de Denne II 1122 in Kingston, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst 35 und seine Mutter Johanna Sybella de Gatton 33. Er hat 1150 in Rushton, Northamptonshire, England Beatrice Bassett geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1189 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Purbeck, Dorset, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Purbeck, Dorset, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Beatrice Bassett nel 1150, nel Rushton, Northamptonshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1189, nel Purbeck, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolto a Purbeck, Dorset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Amfridus de Denne IIが1122年にイギリスケントキングストンで生まれた時，父Ralph de Dene of Buckhurstは35歳，母Johanna Sybella de Gattonは33歳であった。1150年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアルシュトンでBeatrice Bassettと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1189年にイギリスイギリスドールセトプウルベックで67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスドールセトプウルベックにて埋葬された。

ko.Buckhurst, Sussex, England: 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 벅후르스트 비 위스이함
ko.lifeSummary: Robert Amfridus de Denne II(이)가 1122년 영국 켄트 킨그스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Johanna Sybella de Gatton(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1150년 영국 노르섬프토실르 러슈턴에서 Beatrice Bassett(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1189년 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 푸르벡에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 도르세트 푸르벡에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Amfridus de Denne II nasceu em 1122, em Kingston, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Johanna Sybella de Gatton, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice Bassett em 1150, em Rushton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1189, em Purbeck, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos, e foi sepultado em Purbeck, Dorset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Buckhurst, Sussex, England: буккхурст би витихам, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Amfridus de Denne II родился в 1122 г. в местности кингстон, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph de Dene of Buckhurst было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Johanna Sybella de Gatton, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice Bassett в 1150 г. в местности руштон, нортамптоншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1189 г. в местности пурбекк, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности пурбекк, дорсет, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Beatrice Bassett en 1150, en Rushton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1189, en Purbeck, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultado en Purbeck, Dorset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
